The '''Freighter Type H''' was a medium-sized cargo freighter manufactured by [[Galarne/Ferges Industries]]. The craft's unusual design and slightly smoother than usual handling characteristics allowed this small manufacturer to squeeze into the crowded freighter market.

Unarmed and only lightly armored, the Type H was best deployed as part of a defended convoy, as its maximum speed was easily no match for even the most primitive [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
